1205.name: ADAPt
1205.description: Convert <scaleAD>Bonus Attack Damage</scaleAD> to <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP>. Gain <scaleAP>@APAmp*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

1141.name: All For You
1141.description: Your <healing>Heals</healing> and <shield>Shields</shield> are @HealShieldAmp*100@% stronger when used on an ally.

1002.name: Apex Inventor
1002.description:
Gain @ItemHaste@ Item Haste (equivalent to @TooltipCDR@% Item CDR).

Item Haste reduces the cooldown %i:cooldown% of all Item Abilities.

1004.name: Back To Basics
1004.description: Gain increased Ability Damage, <healing>Healing</healing>, <shield>Shielding</shield>, and Ability Haste, but you <keywordMajor>cannot use your Ultimate Ability</keywordMajor>.

1180.name: Big Brain
1180.description: At the start of each round, gain<shield> @ShieldBase@ Shield </shield>for every <scaleAP>%i:scaleAP% @AP@ Ability Power</scaleAP>.

1006.name: Blade Waltz
1006.description:
Gain the Blade Waltz Summoner Spell.

Blade Waltz makes you untargetable while you dash at and damage enemies @TotalHits@ times.

1009.name: Buff Buddies
1009.description: You gain <font color = '#f30c1a'>Crest of Cinders</font> and <font color = '#1542ea'>Crest of Insight</font>.

1011.name: Can't Touch This
1011.description: Casting your Ultimate makes you <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for a short duration.

1013.name: Celestial Body
1013.description: Gain <scaleHealth>@Health@ Health</scaleHealth>, but you deal @DamageReduction*100@% less damage.

1397.name: Cerberus
1397.description: Gain the <spellName>Hail of Blades</spellName> and <spellName>Press the Attack</spellName> Keystone Runes.

1368.name: Chauffeur
1368.description: You are attached to your ally and can't move on your own. Your <speed>bonus Move Speed</speed> is also granted to your ally, and you gain Ability Haste and <attackSpeed>Attack Speed</attackSpeed>.

1015.name: Circle of Death
1015.description: <healing>Healing</healing> and <healing>Health Regen</healing> you do deals a portion of the value as <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to the nearest enemy champion.

1310.name: Clown College
1310.description:
Gain Deceive Summoner Spell.
Gain Backstab Passive.

When you die, spawn an exploding box that deals a large amount of true damage and Fear nearby enemies.

1018.name: Courage of the Colossus
1018.description: Gain @TotalShield@ Shield after Immobilizing or Grounding an enemy champion.

1118.name: Critical Healing
1118.description: Your <healing>Heals</healing> and <shield>Shields</shield> can Critically Strike for @CritHeal*100@% bonus amount. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

1019.name: Dashing
1019.description: Your dash, leap, blink, or teleport Abilities gain @Haste@ Ability Haste.

1020.name: Dawnbringer's Resolve
1020.description: Upon dropping below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, heal for @HealAmount*100@% max Health over 3 seconds.

1023.name: Demon's Dance
1023.description: Gain the Fleet Footwork and Grasp of the Undying Keystone Runes.

1025.name: Dive Bomber
1025.description: Your team's first death each round explodes, dealing <trueDamage>massive damage true damage</trueDamage>.

1301.name: Divine Intervention
1301.description: @InitalDelay@ seconds into combat, call upon a protective star that slowly descends upon you. When it lands, you and nearby allies become <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for a few seconds. Then <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> this every @BaseCD@ seconds.

1026.name: Don't Blink
1026.description: Deal more damage to enemies the faster you are than them.

1134.name: Draw Your Sword
1134.description: You are now melee. Gain <physicalDamage>@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage</physicalDamage>, <healing>@BonusHP*100@% Health</healing>, <attackSpeed>@BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed</attackSpeed>, <lifesteal>@BonusLifesteal*100@% Lifesteal</lifesteal>, and <speed>@BonusMS*100@% Move Speed</speed> (each further increased based on Attack Range lost).

1225.name: Dual Wield
1225.description: When you Attack, fire a bolt that deals @AttackReduction*100@% damage and applies your {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects at @OnHitMod*100@% effectiveness. Gain <attackSpeed>@AttackSpeed*100@% total Attack Speed</attackSpeed>.

1027.name: Earthwake
1027.description: Your dash, blink, or teleport Abilities leave behind a trail that detonates after 1 second.

1028.name: Erosion
1028.description: Damaging enemies adds a stacking <scaleArmor>Armor</scaleArmor> and <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR> shred for @ShredDuration@s.

1029.name: Ethereal Weapon
1029.description: Your Abilities apply {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects. 1 second cooldown per target.

1030.name: Eureka
1030.description: Gain Ability Haste equal to <scaleAP>@APToHasteConversion*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

1032.name: Executioner
1032.description: Deal @BonusDamage*100@% more damage to enemies below @HealthThreshold*100@% health. Reset your basic abilities on takedown.

1220.name: Fan The Hammer
1220.description: When you Attack, fire @AdditionalBolts@ additional bolts that each deal <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> based on distance travelled. Has a per direction Cooldown.

1035.name: Feel the Burn
1035.description:
Gain the Feel the Burn Summoner Spell.

Feel the Burn casts Ignite and Exhaust on all nearby enemy champions.

1194.name: Fey Magic
1194.description: Damaging with your Ultimate <status>Polymorphs</status> enemies for a few seconds.

1036.name: Firebrand
1036.description: Your Attacks apply an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}, dealing damage over time.

1308.name: FireFox
1308.description:
Autocast
Gain movement speed and conjure three flames that orbit you, targetting the closest visible enemy in range and dealing adaptive damage.

1187.name: Flashbang
1187.description: When you Flash, there is an explosion around you dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> and <status>Slowing</status> enemies hit. Additionally, Flash resets every round.

1116.name: Flashy
1116.description: Your Flash has @FlashAmmoTooltip@ Ammo and a @FlashCooldown@ second Cooldown.

1038.name: From Beginning To End
1038.description: Gain the <spellName>First Strike</spellName> and <spellName>Dark Harvest</spellName> Keystone Runes.

1039.name: Frost Wraith
1039.description: Autocast Root nearby enemies for @RootDuration@ seconds every @Cooldown@ seconds.

1195.name: Giant Slayer
1195.description: Become tiny, gain <speed>Move Speed</speed>, and bonus damage to champions based on how much larger they are than you.

1041.name: Goliath
1041.description: Become large, gaining <scaleHealth>@HealthAmp*100@% Health</scaleHealth> and <scaleAP>@ADAmp*100@% Adaptive Force</scaleAP>.

1181.name: Heavy Hitter
1181.description: Your Attacks deal additional <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> equal to @HealthPercent*100@% of your <scaleHealth>max Health.</scaleHealth>

1198.name: Holy Fire
1198.description: <healing>Healing</healing> or <shield>Shielding</shield> applies an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> to a nearby enemy, dealing <magicDamage>percent max Health magic damage</magicDamage> over a few seconds.

1105.name: Homeguard
1105.description: Gain <speed>@spell.Augment_Homeguard:MovementSpeed*100@% Move Speed</speed>, disabled for @spell.Augment_Homeguard:DisableCooldown@ seconds after taking damage.

1044.name: Ice Cold
1044.description: Your <status>Slowing</status> effects reduce <speed>Move Speed</speed> by an extra 100.

1149.name: Impassable
1149.description: Gain the <spellName>Aftershock</spellName> and <spellName>Glacial Augment</spellName> Keystone Runes.

1045.name: Infernal Conduit
1045.description:
Your Abilities apply an infinitely stacking Burn, dealing magic damage over time.

Your Burn effects reduce your basic Ability Cooldowns.

1046.name: Infernal Soul
1046.description: You gain the Infernal Soul, dealing bonus damage when you hit enemies with Abilities or Attacks.

1211.name: It's Killing Time
1211.description: After casting your Ultimate, mark all enemy champions for death. While marked, store a percentage of damage dealt to them, and detonate the damage when the mark ends.

1048.name: Jeweled Gauntlet
1048.description: Your Abilities can Critically Strike. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

1050.name: Keystone Conjurer
1050.description: Gain the <spellName>Summon Aery</spellName> and <spellName>Arcane Comet</spellName> Keystone Runes.

1174.name: Laser Eyes
1174.description: There is a laser in the direction you are facing that deals continuous <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage>.

1305.name: Leg Day
1305.description: Gain <speed>@MovementSpeed@ Movement Speed</speed> and <speed>@SlowResist*100@% Slow Resist</speed>.

1051.name: Light 'Em Up!
1051.description: Every 4th Attack deals additional <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}.

1052.name: Lightning Strikes
1052.description:
Gain @TotalASValue*100@% total Attack Speed.

At @Breakpoint1@ Attacks per second, deal additional magic damage {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}.

1053.name: Mad Scientist
1053.description: On Round start you grow large (<font color = '#8347ff'>Adaptive Force</font> and <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>) or tiny (Ability Haste and <speed>Move Speed</speed>).

1133.name: Magic Missile
1133.description: Dealing damage with an Ability fires @NumberOfMissiles@ magic missiles at them, each dealing <trueDamage>percent max Health true damage</trueDamage> based on distance traveled.

1129.name: Marksmage
1129.description: Your Attacks deal additional <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> equal to <scaleAP>@APRatio*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

1054.name: Master of Duality
1054.description: Your Attacks grant you <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} and your Abilities grant you <scaleAD>Attack Damage</scaleAD>, stacking infinitely until the end of the round.

1056.name: Mind to Matter
1056.description: Increase <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth> by half of your <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana>.

1104.name: Minionmancer
1104.description: Your summons gain @MinionSizeIncrease*100@% increased size, health, and damage.

1057.name: Mountain Soul
1057.description: You gain the Mountain Soul, gaining a <shield>Shield</shield> after being out of combat for a short time.

1058.name: Mystic Punch
1058.description: {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} reduce the cooldown of your abilities by @CooldownRefund@ seconds.

1060.name: Ocean Soul
1060.description: Gain the Ocean Soul, granting high <healing>Health</healing> and <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana> regen after damaging enemies.

1061.name: Ok Boomerang
1061.description: <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> throw a boomerang at a nearby enemy every @BaseCooldown@s.

1208.name: Orbital Laser
1208.description:
Replace Summoner Flee with Orbital Laser.

After a delay, call down an orbital laser that deals @DamagetoChampions*100@% max Health true damage plus @TotalDamageOverTimeTooltip@ magic damage over @GroundDuration@ seconds.

1063.name: Outlaw's Grit
1063.description: After using a dash, blink, or teleport you gain <scaleArmor>@ResistsPerStack@ Armor</scaleArmor> and <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR> up to @MaxResistTooltipOnly@ at @MaxStacks@ stacks.

1311.name: Overflow
1311.description: Your <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana> costs double. Your Ability <healing>Heals</healing>, <shield>Shields</shield>, and damage are increased based on your <scaleMana>max Mana</scaleMana>.

12317.name: Pandora's Box
12317.description: Transmute all of your augments into random Prismatic augments.

1064.name: Perseverance
1064.description: Gain hugely increased <healing>Health Regen</healing>, even further increased at low <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>.

1390.name: Phenomenal Evil
1390.description:
Permanently gain @APPerProc@ Ability Power when you hit enemies with Abilities.

If taken as your second Augment, starts with @StartingAPIfSecondAugment@ Ability Power.

1066.name: Quantum Computing
1066.description: Periodically <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> a massive slash around you, dealing <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage>. Enemies hit by the outer half are <status>Slowed</status>, take additional <physicalDamage>max Health physical damage</physicalDamage>, and you heal for a percent of the bonus damage.

1152.name: Quest: Steel Your Heart
1152.description:
Requirement: Possess Heartsteel with @StackThreshold@+ stacks.

Reward: Multiply your Heartsteel stacks by @StackMultiplication@. Increase your Health Regeneration by @StacktoRegenConversion*100@% of your Heartsteel stacks.

1156.name: Quest: Wooglet's Witchcap
1156.description:
Immediate: Gain Needlessly Large Rod.

Requirement: Possess Rabadon's Deathcap and Zhonya's Hourglass.

Reward: Gain Wooglet's Witchcap

1069.name: Repulsor
1069.description: On dropping below @HealthThreshold1*100@% or @HealthThreshold2*100@% Health, nearby enemies are <status>Knocked Back</status>.

1170.name: Scoped Weapons
1170.description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

1071.name: Scopier Weapons
1071.description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

1115.name: Scopiest Weapons
1115.description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

1072.name: Searing Dawn
1072.description: Your Abilities mark enemies, causing them to take extra <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> from your ally's next Attack or Ability.

1108.name: Self Destruct
1108.description: Start each round with a bomb attached to you. After @BombDelay@ seconds, it explodes, dealing massive true damage and Knocking Up nearby enemies.

1073.name: Shadow Runner
1073.description: After using a dash, leap, blink, or teleport Ability or exiting <stealth>Stealth</stealth>, gain <speed>@spell.Augment_ShadowRunner:MSAmount@ Move Speed</speed> for @spell.Augment_ShadowRunner:BuffDuration@ seconds.

1074.name: Shrink Ray
1074.description: Your Attacks reduce an enemy's damage by @DamageReduction*100@% for 3 seconds.

1113.name: Skilled Sniper
1113.description: Hitting an enemy with a non-Ultimate Ability at far range reduces its Cooldown to @ReducedCooldown@ seconds (@PeriodicReductionAmount@ for periodic Abilities).

1136.name: Slap Around
1136.description: Each time you <status>Immobilize</status> or <status>Ground</status> an enemy, gain <font color = '#8347ff'>@AdaptiveForce@ Adaptive Force</font> for the round, stacking infinitely.

1250.name: Slow And Steady
1250.description: Your Attack Speed becomes @StaticRatio@. All Bonus Attack Speed is converted to Attack Damage. (@ADPerAS@AD per 1% AS).

1075.name: Slow Cooker
1075.description: Every second, apply an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> to nearby enemy champions, scaling with your <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth>.

1076.name: Sonic Boom
1076.description: Buffing, <healing>Healing</healing>, or <shield>Shielding</shield> your ally deals damage and <status>Slows</status> enemies surrounding them.

1077.name: Soul Siphon
1077.description: Gain <crit>@CritChance*100@% Crit Chance</crit> and <lifeSteal>@HealPercentage*100@% lifesteal on <crit>Critical Strikes</crit></lifeSteal>.

1135.name: Spellwake
1135.description: Hitting enemies with Abilities creates a blast that deals <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> from you to the location you hit them.

1214.name: Spin To Win
1214.description: Your spin Abilities gain @SpinHaste@ Ability Haste and deal @SpinDamageAmp*100@% more damage!

1204.name: Stackosaurus Rex
1204.description: When you gain permanent <keywordMajor>Stacks</keywordMajor> of an Ability, gain @StackModifier*100@% more!

1079.name: Symphony of War
1079.description: Gain the <spellName>Lethal Tempo</spellName> and <spellName>Conqueror</spellName> Keystone Runes.

1353.name: Tank Engine
1353.description: Gain @SizeIncrement*100@% increase in size and <scaleHealth>@MaxHPIncrement*100@% bonus Health</scaleHealth> per takedown.

1080.name: Tank It Or Leave It
1080.description: You can <crit>Critically Defend</crit> using your Crit Chance (max @MaxChance*100@% chance), giving you a chance to reduce damage. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

1081.name: Tap Dancer
1081.description: Your Attacks grant you <speed>@MSPerHit@ Move Speed</speed>, stacking infinitely. Gain <attackSpeed>Attack Speed</attackSpeed> equal to @MSToASConversion*10000@% of your <speed>Move Speed</speed>.

1082.name: The Brutalizer
1082.description: Gain <scaleAD>@AD@ Attack Damage</scaleAD>, @AbilityHaste@ Ability Haste, and <scaleLethality>@Lethality@ Lethality</scaleLethality>.

1085.name: Tormentor
1085.description: <status>Immobilizing</status> or <status>Grounding</status> enemy champions applies a <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> that deals damage over time, stacking infinitely.

1086.name: Trueshot Prodigy
1086.description: When you damage a champion from far away, fire a <abilityName>Trueshot Barrage</abilityName> at them.

1107.name: Twice Thrice
1107.description: Every third Attack, your {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects trigger a second time.

1087.name: Typhoon
1087.description: Your Attacks fire a bolt at an additional target dealing reduced damage and applying {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects.

1088.name: Ultimate Revolution
1088.description: Once per round, refresh your Ultimate Ability after casting it.

1112.name: Ultimate Unstoppable
1112.description: After using your Ultimate, you become immune to crowd control for @UnstoppableDuration@ seconds. (@Cooldown@ second Cooldown).

1092.name: Vulnerability
1092.description: Your Item and damage over time effects can Critically Strike. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit chance.

1098.name: With Haste
1098.description: Gain <speed>Move Speed</speed> equal to @AbilityHasteToMSConversion*100@% of your Ability Haste.

1206.name: escAPADe
1206.description: Convert <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> to <scaleAD>Bonus Attack Damage</scaleAD>. Gain <scaleAD>@ADAmp*100@% Attack Damage</scaleAD>.

1372.name: I'm a Baby Kitty Where is Mama

205.name: ADAPt
205.description: Convert <scaleAD>Bonus Attack Damage</scaleAD> to <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP>. Gain <scaleAP>@APAmp*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

1.name: Accelerating Sorcery
1.description: Using Abilities grant you infinitely stacking Ability Haste, this resets each round.

336.name: Aim for the Head
336.description:
Gain @CritChanceBonus*100@% Critical Strike Chance and @CritDamageBonus*100@% Critical Strike Damage. Your Critical Strike Chance is capped at @CritChanceCeiling*100@%.

Convert @CritChanceToDamageRatio*100@% of Critical Strike Chance above @CritChanceCeiling*100@% into Critical Strike Damage.

141.name: All For You
141.description: Your <healing>Heals</healing> and <shield>Shields</shield> are @HealShieldAmp*100@% stronger when used on an ally.

309.name: And My Axe!
309.description:
Autocast:
Periodically throws an axe at the nearest opponent, dealing damage, slowing, and shredding their armor and magic resist. The cooldown is reduced if the axe is picked up.

2.name: Apex Inventor
2.description:
Gain @ItemHaste@ Item Haste (equivalent to @TooltipCDR@% Item CDR).

Item Haste reduces the cooldown %i:cooldown% of all Item Abilities.

404.name: 404 Augment Not Found
404.description:
How did you find this?!?!?

Gain @HatsToGrant@ hats.

405.name: Augment 405
405.description: Gain @DamageAmpPerHat*100@% damage per hat you're wearing.

322.name: Augmented Power
322.description: Increase the damage done by your augments and items by @DamageAmp@.

4.name: Back To Basics
4.description: Gain increased Ability Damage, <healing>Healing</healing>, <shield>Shielding</shield>, and Ability Haste, but you <keywordMajor>cannot use your Ultimate Ability</keywordMajor>.

5.name: Banner of Command
5.description:
Gain the Banner of Command Summoner Spell.

Banner of Command empowers your ally for a brief duration.

180.name: Big Brain
180.description: At the start of each round, gain<shield> @ShieldBase@ Shield </shield>for every <scaleAP>%i:scaleAP% @AP@ Ability Power</scaleAP>.

6.name: Blade Waltz
6.description:
Gain the Blade Waltz Summoner Spell.

Blade Waltz makes you untargetable while you dash at and damage enemies @TotalHits@ times.

200.name: Blood Brother
200.description:
Gain Darius's Passive Hemorrhage.

Attacks and damaging Abilities cause the target to Hemorrhage, dealing @BleedDamagePerStack@ physical damage over @BleedDuration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.

Draven gains @NoxianMightBonusAD@ Attack Damage at @MaxStacks@ Hemorrhage stacks.

321.name: Bodyguard
321.description: Using a dash, blink, or teleport grants yourself a <shield>shield</shield> for @ShieldDuration@ seconds, this shield is also granted to any allies you pass through. The strength of this <shield>shield</shield> depends on your abilities base cooldown at level 1.

324.name: Bravest of the Brave
324.description: Increase future augment offerings by @tierValueIncrease@ tier. If the augments were already Prismatic tier, gain a bonus @GoldAmount@ gold.

9.name: Buff Buddies
9.description: You gain <font color = '#f30c1a'>Crest of Cinders</font> and <font color = '#1542ea'>Crest of Insight</font>.

320.name: Calculated Risk
320.description:
Instantly consume your remaining rerolls, you can no longer reroll.

Select a Gold Augment, if at least @PrismaticThreshold@ rerolls were consumed this way, empower this to select a Prismatic Augment instead.

10.name: Cannon Fodder
10.description: You enter combat launching from a cannon.

11.name: Can't Touch This
11.description: Casting your Ultimate makes you <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for a short duration.

12.name: Castle
12.description:
Gain the Castle Summoner Spell.

Castle: Swap places with your ally, gaining Move Speed and a Shield.

13.name: Celestial Body
13.description: Gain <scaleHealth>@Health@ Health</scaleHealth>, but you deal @DamageReduction*100@% less damage.

193.name: Center of the Universe
193.description: Stars orbit you at your Attack Range, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies they pass through.

323.name: Cerberus
323.description: Gain the <spellName>Hail of Blades</spellName> and <spellName>Press the Attack</spellName> Keystone Runes.

166.name: Chain Lightning
166.description: Dealing damage to an enemy also damages their partner for <trueDamage>@DamageMod*100@% damage dealt true damage</trueDamage> if they're nearby.

14.name: Chauffeur
14.description: You are attached to your ally and can't move on your own. Your <speed>bonus Move Speed</speed> is also granted to your ally, and you gain Ability Haste and <attackSpeed>Attack Speed</attackSpeed>.

15.name: Circle of Death
15.description: <healing>Healing</healing> and <healing>Health Regen</healing> you do deals a portion of the value as <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to the nearest enemy champion.

110.name: Clothesline
110.description: There is a tether between you and your partner that deals constant <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies inside.

310.name: Clown College
310.description:
Gain Deceive Summoner Spell.
Gain Backstab Passive.

When you die, spawn an exploding box that deals a large amount of true damage and Fear nearby enemies.

16.name: Combo Master
16.description: Gain the <spellName>Electrocute</spellName> and <spellName>Phase Rush</spellName> Keystone Runes.

17.name: Contract Killer
17.description: Each round, mark an opponent to take @spell.Augment_ContractKiller:DamageAmp*100@% more damage and grant an extra @spell.Augment_ContractKiller:Gold@ gold on death.

18.name: Courage of the Colossus
18.description: Gain @TotalShield@ Shield after Immobilizing or Grounding an enemy champion.

118.name: Critical Healing
118.description: Your <healing>Heals</healing> and <shield>Shields</shield> can Critically Strike for @CritHeal*100@% bonus amount. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

215.name: Dark Blessing
215.description:
Healing/Shielding grants you permanent Cursed Power. Gain Ability Haste based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

19.name: Dashing
19.description: Your dash, leap, blink, or teleport Abilities gain @Haste@ Ability Haste.

20.name: Dawnbringer's Resolve
20.description: Upon dropping below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, heal for @HealAmount*100@% max Health over 3 seconds.

217.name: Deathtouch
217.description:
Attacking enemy champions grants permanent Cursed Power and deal additional magic damage based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

21.name: Defensive Maneuvers
21.description:
Gain the Defensive Maneuvers Summoner Spell.

Defensive Maneuvers Casts both Summoner Barrier and Heal on you and your teammate.

171.name: Dematerialize
171.description:
Gain @AdaptiveForce@ Adaptive Force on takedown, once per champion per round.

If taken as your second Augment, starts with @SecondPickBonus@ Adaptive Force.

23.name: Demon's Dance
23.description: Gain the Fleet Footwork and Grasp of the Undying Keystone Runes.

218.name: Desecrator
218.description:
Immobilizing enemy champions grants you permanent Cursed Power. Gain Armor and Magic Resistance based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

24.name: Die Another Day
24.description:
Gain the Die Another Day Summoner Spell.

Die Another Day creates a zone where no unit can die for 4 seconds.

25.name: Dive Bomber
25.description: Your team's first death each round explodes, dealing <trueDamage>massive damage true damage</trueDamage>.

301.name: Divine Intervention
301.description: @InitalDelay@ seconds into combat, call upon a protective star that slowly descends upon you. When it lands, you and nearby allies become <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for a few seconds. Then <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> this every @BaseCD@ seconds.

26.name: Don't Blink
26.description: Deal more damage to enemies the faster you are than them.

102.name: Don't Chase
102.description: You become Ghosted and leave a trail of poisonous gas behind you, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies inside.

219.name: Doomsayer
219.description:
Hitting enemy champions with abilities grants you permanent Cursed Power. Gain Adaptive Force based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

134.name: Draw Your Sword
134.description: You are now melee. Gain <physicalDamage>@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage</physicalDamage>, <healing>@BonusHP*100@% Health</healing>, <attackSpeed>@BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed</attackSpeed>, <lifesteal>@BonusLifesteal*100@% Lifesteal</lifesteal>, and <speed>@BonusMS*100@% Move Speed</speed> (each further increased based on Attack Range lost).

216.name: Dreadbringer
216.description:
Gain an aura that continuously harvests permanent Cursed Power per enemy champion inside. Gain max Health based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

225.name: Dual Wield
225.description: When you Attack, fire a bolt that deals @AttackReduction*100@% damage and applies your {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects at @OnHitMod*100@% effectiveness. Gain <attackSpeed>@AttackSpeed*100@% total Attack Speed</attackSpeed>.

27.name: Earthwake
27.description: Your dash, blink, or teleport Abilities leave behind a trail that detonates after 1 second.

344.name: Energetic
344.description: Gain <keyword>Energized</keyword> twice as quickly. Triggering <keyword>Energized</keyword> fires a <keywordMajor>Magic Missile</keywordMajor>, dealing up to <trueDamage>@MaxHealthDamagePerMissile*100@% max Health true damage</trueDamage> based on distance travelled.

28.name: Erosion
28.description: Damaging enemies adds a stacking <scaleArmor>Armor</scaleArmor> and <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR> shred for @ShredDuration@s.

29.name: Ethereal Weapon
29.description: Your Abilities apply {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects. 1 second cooldown per target.

30.name: Eureka
30.description: Gain Ability Haste equal to <scaleAP>@APToHasteConversion*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

32.name: Executioner
32.description: Deal @BonusDamage*100@% more damage to enemies below @HealthThreshold*100@% health. Reset your basic abilities on takedown.

33.name: Extendo-Arm
33.description: <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> fire a Blitzcrank hook every 12 seconds at a nearby enemy champion.

34.name: Fallen Aegis
34.description:
Start combat with a Black Shield for @ShieldDuration@s.

Black Shield blocks Magic Damage and Immobilizing effects.

220.name: Fan the Hammer
220.description: When you Attack, fire @AdditionalBolts@ additional bolts that each deal <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> based on distance travelled. Has a per direction Cooldown.

35.name: Feel the Burn
35.description:
Gain the Feel the Burn Summoner Spell.

Feel the Burn casts Ignite and Exhaust on all nearby enemy champions.

194.name: Fey Magic
194.description: Damaging with your Ultimate <status>Polymorphs</status> enemies for a few seconds.

229.name: Fire Sale
229.description: Instantly sell all your non-quest items for @SellValueTooltip@% of their direct buy price. Great for all those discounted anvils.

36.name: Firebrand
36.description: Your Attacks apply an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}, dealing damage over time.

308.name: Firefox
308.description:
Autocast
Gain movement speed and conjure three flames that orbit you, targetting the closest visible enemy in range and dealing adaptive damage.

187.name: Flashbang
187.description: When you Flash, there is an explosion around you dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> and <status>Slowing</status> enemies hit. Additionally, Flash resets every round.

116.name: Flashy
116.description: Your Flash has @FlashAmmoTooltip@ Ammo and a @FlashCooldown@ second Cooldown.

38.name: From Beginning to End
38.description: Gain the <spellName>First Strike</spellName> and <spellName>Dark Harvest</spellName> Keystone Runes.

39.name: Frost Wraith
39.description: Autocast Root nearby enemies for @RootDuration@ seconds every @Cooldown@ seconds.

40.name: Frozen Foundations
40.description:
Gain the Frozen Foundations Summoner Spell.

Frozen Foundations summons a wall of ice at a location.

222.name: Fruits of Your Labor
222.description: Power Flowers are @AmpAmountTooltip@% more effective on you and are shared with your ally.

234.name: Gamba Anvil
234.description:
Gain @GoldBonus@ gold and reduce the price of all anvils.

Prismatic Anvils: @PrismaticCostReduction@
Legendary Anvils: @LegendaryCostReduction@
Stat Anvils: @StatCostReduction@

Items acquired from anvils resell for 500 gold less.

195.name: Giant Slayer
195.description: Become tiny, gain <speed>Move Speed</speed>, and bonus damage to champions based on how much larger they are than you.

303.name: Sacrifice: For Gold
303.description:
Sacrifice @HealthReduction*100@% of your current health.

After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Gold Augment and restore your health.

304.name: Sacrifice: For Prismatic
304.description:
Sacrifice @HealthReduction*100@% of your current health.

After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Prismatic Augment and restore your health.

302.name: Sacrifice: For Silver
302.description: After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus <keywordMajor>Silver Augment</keywordMajor>.

41.name: Goliath
41.description: Become large, gaining <scaleHealth>@HealthAmp*100@% Health</scaleHealth> and <scaleAP>@ADAmp*100@% Adaptive Force</scaleAP>.

241.name: Hat Trick
241.description:
Instantly gain @HatsToGrant@ hats, and reduce the price of Cappa Juice by @HatTrickPriceReduction@.
Taking damage that would reduce your Health below @LowHealthThreshold*100@% gain @MoveSpeedBoostPercent*100@% Move Speed and a @ShieldHealth@ shield for @ShieldDuration@, but lose one hat. @Cooldown@ second Cooldown.

181.name: Heavy Hitter
181.description: Your Attacks deal additional <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> equal to @HealthPercent*100@% of your <scaleHealth>max Health.</scaleHealth>

338.name: Hive Mind
338.description: Start each round with @StartingBees@ Bee, gain additonal Bees by harvesting flowers. Damaging an enemy champion sends a Bee dealing @BeeDamage@ magic damage over @DebuffDuration@ seconds on arrival, before returning to you.

207.name: Hold Very Still
207.description:
Gain Guerrilla Warfare.

After not moving for @HoldStillDuration@ seconds, turn Invisibile until you move. When you exit this Invisibility,your first hit deals bonus magic damage gain @BonusAS@ Attack Speed and @BonusMS*100@% decaying Move Speed.

198.name: Holy Fire
198.description: <healing>Healing</healing> or <shield>Shielding</shield> applies an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> to a nearby enemy, dealing <magicDamage>percent max Health magic damage</magicDamage> over a few seconds.

105.name: Homeguard
105.description: Gain <speed>@spell.Augment_Homeguard:MovementSpeed*100@% Move Speed</speed>, disabled for @spell.Augment_Homeguard:DisableCooldown@ seconds after taking damage.

357.name: Hybrid
357.description:
When you deal damage with an Attack, your next Ability deals @AbilityBoost*100@% increased damage.

When you deal damage with an Ability, your next Attack deals @AttackBoost*100@% increased damage.

44.name: Ice Cold
44.description: Your <status>Slowing</status> effects reduce <speed>Move Speed</speed> by an extra 100.

149.name: Impassable
149.description: Gain the <spellName>Aftershock</spellName> and <spellName>Glacial Augment</spellName> Keystone Runes.

45.name: Infernal Conduit
45.description:
Your Abilities apply an infinitely stacking Burn, dealing magic damage over time.

Your Burn effects reduce your basic Ability Cooldowns.

46.name: Infernal Soul
46.description: You gain the Infernal Soul, dealing bonus damage when you hit enemies with Abilities or Attacks.

211.name: It's Killing Time
211.description: After casting your Ultimate, mark all enemy champions for death. While marked, store a percentage of damage dealt to them, and detonate the damage when the mark ends.

48.name: Jeweled Gauntlet
48.description: Your Abilities can Critically Strike. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

49.name: Juice Box
49.description: Each round, you and your teammate get an additional Juice for free.

242.name: Juice Press
242.description:
Juices grant you and your teammate additional effects.

Buff juices cost @PriceReduction*100@% less.

50.name: Keystone Conjurer
50.description: Gain the <spellName>Summon Aery</spellName> and <spellName>Arcane Comet</spellName> Keystone Runes.

174.name: Laser Eyes
174.description: There is a laser in the direction you are facing that deals continuous <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage>.

305.name: Leg Day
305.description: Gain <speed>@MovementSpeed@ Movement Speed</speed> and <speed>@SlowResist*100@% Slow Resist</speed>.

231.name: Light Warden
231.description: Every few seconds, <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> a warding light towards your ally, <shield>Shielding</shield> yourself and allies it passes through. It then returns, repeating the effect.

51.name: Light 'em Up!
51.description: Every 4th Attack deals additional <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}.

52.name: Lightning Strikes
52.description:
Gain @TotalASValue*100@% total Attack Speed.

At @Breakpoint1@ Attacks per second, deal additional magic damage {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}.

53.name: Mad Scientist
53.description: On Round start you grow large (<font color = '#8347ff'>Adaptive Force</font> and <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>) or tiny (Ability Haste and <speed>Move Speed</speed>).

133.name: Magic Missile
133.description: Dealing damage with an Ability fires @NumberOfMissiles@ magic missiles at them, each dealing <trueDamage>percent max Health true damage</trueDamage> based on distance traveled.

129.name: Marksmage
129.description: Your Attacks deal additional <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> equal to <scaleAP>@APRatio*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

54.name: Master of Duality
54.description: Your Attacks grant you <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} and your Abilities grant you <scaleAD>Attack Damage</scaleAD>, stacking infinitely until the end of the round.

56.name: Mind to Matter
56.description: Increase <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth> by half of your <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana>.

104.name: Minionmancer
104.description: Your summons gain @MinionSizeIncrease*100@% increased size, health, and damage.

172.name: Mirror Image
172.description: When you drop below <scaleHealth>@HealthThreshold*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, briefly become <keywordStealth>Invisible</keywordStealth> and create 4 clones of yourself.

57.name: Mountain Soul
57.description: You gain the Mountain Soul, gaining a <shield>Shield</shield> after being out of combat for a short time.

331.name: Multitool
331.description: Add Multitool to your inventory. During each Shopping Phase, choose 1 of 5 random items, and Multitool becomes that item for the next combat round.

58.name: Mystic Punch
58.description: {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} reduce the cooldown of your abilities by @CooldownRefund@ seconds.

177.name: Nesting Doll
177.description:
You automatically begin Reviving yourself after @ReviveArmTime@ seconds and you can be Revived an additional time. Each time you Revive, come back smaller and with reduced max Health.

When you revive, Knockback enemies around you.

43.name: Now You See Me
43.description:
Gain the Now You See Me Summoner Spell.

Now You See Me teleports you back to the starting position of your last Movement Ability.

251.name: Numb to Pain
251.description: @MeleeReduction*100@% of damage you take instead happens over @BleedDuration@ seconds (@RangedReduction*100@% for ranged champions).

109.name: Oathsworn
109.description:
Replace Summoner Flee with Fate's Call.

Fate's Call making your ally Untargetable for up to 4 seconds. your ally can launch themself out, Knocking Back enemies.

60.name: Ocean Soul
60.description: Gain the Ocean Soul, granting high <healing>Health</healing> and <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana> regen after damaging enemies.

61.name: OK Boomerang
61.description: <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> throw a boomerang at a nearby enemy every @BaseCooldown@s.

208.name: Orbital Laser
208.description:
Replace Summoner Flee with Orbital Laser.

After a delay, call down an orbital laser that deals @DamagetoChampions*100@% max Health true damage plus @TotalDamageOverTimeTooltip@ magic damage over @GroundDuration@ seconds.

63.name: Outlaw's Grit
63.description: After using a dash, blink, or teleport you gain <scaleArmor>@ResistsPerStack@ Armor</scaleArmor> and <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR> up to @MaxResistTooltipOnly@ at @MaxStacks@ stacks.

311.name: Overflow
311.description: Your <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana> costs double. Your Ability <healing>Heals</healing>, <shield>Shields</shield>, and damage are increased based on your <scaleMana>max Mana</scaleMana>.

317.name: Pandora's Box
317.description: Transmute all of your augments into random Prismatic augments.

335.name: Panic Room
335.description: Once per combat, when you would die, instead turn into a wisp, set yourself to <scaleHealth>@HealthLock*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, and travel to a random spot in the arena.

240.name: Parasitic Mutation
240.description:
Every round this mutates into one of your opponent's augments.

Only mutates into augments you could roll.

175.name: Parasitic Relationship
175.description: You <healing>heal for @HealPercent*100@%</healing> of the damage dealt by your partner.

64.name: Perseverance
64.description: Gain hugely increased <healing>Health Regen</healing>, even further increased at low <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>.

65.name: Phenomenal Evil
65.description:
Permanently gain @APPerProc@ Ability Power when you hit enemies with Abilities.

If taken as your second Augment, starts with @StartingAPIfSecondAugment@ Ability Power.

224.name: Prismatic Egg
224.description:
Gain @KillStackCredit@ stack on takedown, once per champion per round.

Every @RequiredKillCount@ stacks, this hatches into a Prismatic Anvil and @RerollsToGrant@ bonus reroll.

66.name: Quantum Computing
66.description: Periodically <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> a massive slash around you, dealing <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage>. Enemies hit by the outer half are <status>Slowed</status>, take additional <physicalDamage>max Health physical damage</physicalDamage>, and you heal for a percent of the bonus damage.

192.name: Quest: Angel of Retribution
192.description:
Requirement: Heal or prevent @RequirementAmount@ damage to allies.

Reward: Gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed, and your Attacks deal additional magic damage equal to @HealPowerToDamageConversion*100@% Heal/Shield Power.

318.name: Quest: Mad Hatter
318.description:
Requirement: Wear @QuestThreshold@ hats at the end of combat.

Reward: Gain @AFPerHat@ Adaptive Force, @ArmorMRPerHat@ Armor and Magic Resist, @TenacityPerHat*100@% Tenacity, and @MSPerHat@ Movement Speed per hat.

Lose half of your hats when you lose a round.

333.name: Quest: Rite Of The Forge God
333.description:
Requirement: Purchase @AnvilsReqToComplete@ Item Anvils.

Reward: All of your items become Masterwork, increasing their stats by @ItemPercentAmp*100@%.

152.name: Quest: Steel Your Heart
152.description:
Requirement: Possess Heartsteel with @StackThreshold@+ stacks.

Reward: Multiply your Heartsteel stacks by @StackMultiplication@. Increase your Health Regeneration by @StacktoRegenConversion*100@% of your Heartsteel stacks.

319.name: Quest: Three Sacred Treasures
319.description:
Requirement: Possess Infinity Edge, Perplexity, and Hextech Gunblade.

Reward: Yunara's Attacks are replaced with lasers that deal mixed damage.

156.name: Quest: Wooglet's Witchcap
156.description:
Immediate: Gain Needlessly Large Rod.

Requirement: Possess Rabadon's Deathcap and Zhonya's Hourglass.

Reward: Gain Wooglet's Witchcap

125.name: Raid Boss
125.description: You start each round imprisoned in the center of the arena, unable to act. While imprisoned, you have massive damage reduction and accumulate size, <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>, <physicalDamage>Attack Damage</physicalDamage>, and <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> over time. After @ImprisonDuration@ seconds or reaching <scaleHealth>@BreakoutHealthThreshold*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, you break out, <status>Knocking Back</status> enemies and gaining <shield>Shield</shield> based on your <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth>.

69.name: Repulsor
69.description: On dropping below @HealthThreshold1*100@% or @HealthThreshold2*100@% Health, nearby enemies are <status>Knocked Back</status>.

165.name: Restart
165.description: Your non-Ultimate Abilities <keywordMajor>Automatically</keywordMajor> refresh every @CoolDown@ seconds.

343.name: Righteous Fury
343.description: <healing>Healing</healing> or <Shield>Shielding</Shield> increases your Ability damage by @SpellDamagePerStack*100@%, stacking infinitely for the round.

170.name: Scoped Weapons
170.description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

71.name: Scopier Weapons
71.description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

115.name: Scopiest Weapons
115.description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

72.name: Searing Dawn
72.description: Your Abilities mark enemies, causing them to take extra <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> from your ally's next Attack or Ability.

108.name: Self Destruct
108.description: Start each round with a bomb attached to you. After @BombDelay@ seconds, it explodes, dealing massive true damage and Knocking Up nearby enemies.

120.name: Serve Beyond Death
120.description: The first time you would die each round, instead return to full Health, decaying over @DecayDuration@ seconds. Taking down an enemy champion while your Health is decaying stops the decay and sets your Health to <healing>@TriumphPercent@% max Health</healing>.

73.name: Shadow Runner
73.description: After using a dash, leap, blink, or teleport Ability or exiting <stealth>Stealth</stealth>, gain <speed>@spell.Augment_ShadowRunner:MSAmount@ Move Speed</speed> for @spell.Augment_ShadowRunner:BuffDuration@ seconds.

74.name: Shrink Ray
74.description: Your Attacks reduce an enemy's damage by @DamageReduction*100@% for 3 seconds.

113.name: Skilled Sniper
113.description: Hitting an enemy with a non-Ultimate Ability at far range reduces its Cooldown to @ReducedCooldown@ seconds (@PeriodicReductionAmount@ for periodic Abilities).

136.name: Slap Around
136.description: Each time you <status>Immobilize</status> or <status>Ground</status> an enemy, gain <font color = '#8347ff'>@AdaptiveForce@ Adaptive Force</font> for the round, stacking infinitely.

232.name: Slime Time
232.description: Every few seconds <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> a burst slime from your body, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to nearby enemies. If you hit a champion, secrete a blob that heals you when walked over.

250.name: Slow and Steady
250.description: Your Attack Speed becomes @StaticRatio@. All Bonus Attack Speed is converted to Attack Damage. (@ADPerAS@AD per 1% AS).

75.name: Slow Cooker
75.description: Every second, apply an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> to nearby enemy champions, scaling with your <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth>.

176.name: Snowball Fight!
176.description:
Replace Summoner Flee with Mark.

Mark throws a snowball that marks the first enemy hit and deals damage. Recast to dash to the marked enemy.

76.name: Sonic Boom
76.description: Buffing, <healing>Healing</healing>, or <shield>Shielding</shield> your ally deals damage and <status>Slows</status> enemies surrounding them.

77.name: Soul Siphon
77.description: Gain <crit>@CritChance*100@% Crit Chance</crit> and <lifeSteal>@HealPercentage*100@% lifesteal on <crit>Critical Strikes</crit></lifeSteal>.

135.name: Spellwake
135.description: Hitting enemies with Abilities creates a blast that deals <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> from you to the location you hit them.

214.name: Spin To Win
214.description: Your spin Abilities gain @SpinHaste@ Ability Haste and deal @SpinDamageAmp*100@% more damage!

326.name: Spirit Infusion
326.description: Gain Heal and Shield Power, increased when low Health. On Ultimate cast, double your Heal and Shield Power.

78.name: Spirit Link
78.description: @DamageRedirectPercentage*100@% of damage dealt to your ally is redirected to you, and <healing>@HealCopyPercentage*100@% of healing</healing> they receive is also given to you.

204.name: Stackosaurus Rex
204.description: When you gain permanent <keywordMajor>Stacks</keywordMajor> of an Ability, gain @StackModifier*100@% more!

223.name: Summoner Revolution
223.description:
Your Summoner Spells gain an additional charge.

Additionally, Flash resets every round.

123.name: Summoner's Roulette
123.description: Replace your Summoner Spells with random ones. When you use a Summoner Spell, replace it with another random one on a @Cooldown@ second Cooldown.

239.name: Symbiotic Mutation
239.description:
Every round this mutates into one of your ally's augments.

Only mutates into augments you could roll.

79.name: Symphony of War
79.description: Gain the <spellName>Lethal Tempo</spellName> and <spellName>Conqueror</spellName> Keystone Runes.

313.name: Tank Engine
313.description: Gain @SizeIncrement*100@% increase in size and <scaleHealth>@MaxHPIncrement*100@% bonus Health</scaleHealth> per takedown.

80.name: Tank It Or Leave It
80.description: You can <crit>Critically Defend</crit> using your Crit Chance (max @MaxChance*100@% chance), giving you a chance to reduce damage. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

81.name: Tap Dancer
81.description: Your Attacks grant you <speed>@MSPerHit@ Move Speed</speed>, stacking infinitely. Gain <attackSpeed>Attack Speed</attackSpeed> equal to @MSToASConversion*10000@% of your <speed>Move Speed</speed>.

82.name: The Brutalizer
82.description: Gain <scaleAD>@AD@ Attack Damage</scaleAD>, @AbilityHaste@ Ability Haste, and <scaleLethality>@Lethality@ Lethality</scaleLethality>.

85.name: Tormentor
85.description: <status>Immobilizing</status> or <status>Grounding</status> enemy champions applies a <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> that deals damage over time, stacking infinitely.

221.name: Trailblazer
221.description: Dashing or Blinking applies a <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> to a nearby enemy that deals damage over time, stacking infinitely.

236.name: Trickster Demon
236.description: When you exit stealth explode for <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ Magic Damage</magicDamage>, your clones and traps will do the same on death.

86.name: Trueshot Prodigy
86.description: When you damage a champion from far away, fire a <abilityName>Trueshot Barrage</abilityName> at them.

107.name: Twice Thrice
107.description: Every third Attack, your {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects trigger a second time.

87.name: Typhoon
87.description: Your Attacks fire a bolt at an additional target dealing reduced damage and applying {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects.

88.name: Ultimate Revolution
88.description: Once per round, refresh your Ultimate Ability after casting it.

233.name: Ultimate Roulette
233.description: Replace Summoner Flee with a random Ultimate. After casting the Ultimate, replace it with new random Ultimate.

112.name: Ultimate Unstoppable
112.description: After using your Ultimate, you become immune to crowd control for @UnstoppableDuration@ seconds. (@Cooldown@ second Cooldown).

327.name: Undying Guard
327.description: Upon reviving with Cultivation of War, Zaahen deals damage to nearby enemies based on their current Health and knocks all targets back, becoming impervious to damage dealt by champions outside of the circle created and gains a brief burst of movement speed.

314.name: Unshackled
314.description: You can cast <spellName>Hijack</spellName> on your partner. Gain @UltimateHaste@ Ultimate Haste.

90.name: Vengeance
90.description: After your partner dies, gain massively increased damage and <lifeSteal>Omnivamp</lifeSteal> for the remainder of the round.

92.name: Vulnerability
92.description: Your Item and damage over time effects can Critically Strike. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit chance.

93.name: Warmup Routine
93.description:
Gain the Warmup Routine Summoner Spell.

Warmup Routine: Channel your inner dancer to increase your damage for the rest of the round.

312.name: We'll Be Right Back
312.description:
Gain Time Stop Summoner Spell.

Time Stop: ALL nearby champions are put in Stasis. The Stasis is shorter on you, and during it you Heal based on missing Health.

94.name: Willing Sacrifice
94.description: When your ally drops below <scaleHealth>@AllyHealthThreshold*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, trade some of your health for a <shield>Shield</shield> on your ally.

96.name: Wisdom of Ages
96.description:
Gain 1 level now, and 1 bonus level every other round. Your level cap is removed.

If taken as your second Augment, instead gain 3 levels.

98.name: With Haste
98.description: Gain <speed>Move Speed</speed> equal to @AbilityHasteToMSConversion*100@% of your Ability Haste.

206.name: escAPADe
206.description: Convert <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> to <scaleAD>Bonus Attack Damage</scaleAD>. Gain <scaleAD>@ADAmp*100@% Attack Damage</scaleAD>.
